meta.title: Product Orb Face — Campaign Launch Orchestration
meta.usage: Hexagonal product orb face 5 — scroll chapter 06, corner anchor bottom-right

composition_rules.notes: Channel cards as abstract shapes only — no email/social icons with text

midground.notes: Frosted glass hub with coral center glow
Thin arrows radiating outward from hub
Abstract channel destinations — email envelope shape, social rectangle, ad rectangle, all without text or branded icons
Subtle left-to-right wireframe path suggesting strategy to launch

render_prompt: Abstract campaign launch orchestration UI on warm ivory #F8F6F2. Central frosted glass hub with coral #E85D4C glow at center and indigo #4F46E5 outer ring. Five thin luminous wireframe arrows radiating outward to five blank frosted channel cards — abstract geometric shapes suggesting email, social, and ads without branded icons or text. Subtle left-to-right pipeline wireframe path in background. Premium studio lighting, front-facing slight top angle. Clean margins. No text, no logos, no Meta Google LinkedIn icons, no readable labels.
negative_prompt: text, logos, social media brand icons, facebook, instagram, google ads logo, readable UI, rocket emoji style, dark mode, chaotic lines
